metadata.description: Final re-verified ADA database. Every entry has been subjected to automated source verification (PubMed abstract, PMC full-text, DailyMed SPL XML). verification_status field shows result for each entry.

verification_methodology.phase1: Fetched PMID abstract via NCBI efetch OR URL page text; checked if claimed ADA % appears in text
verification_methodology.phase2_pdf: DailyMed SPL XML API used to extract immunogenicity section from FDA labels that were binary PDFs
verification_methodology.phase2_wrongpmid: PubMed esearch + DailyMed used to find correct sources for entries with wrong PMIDs

excluded.detail: PMID 15987447 is a COX-2 paper; DailyMed not found; no ADA source verified
PMID 31711027 is a carbon materials paper; DailyMed not found for belantamab
PMID 34807181 is a metal-mirror paper; Chinese NMPA drug with no FDA/DailyMed entry
